title: Saudi Arabian Pilaf
description: A flavorful Saudi Arabian pilaf dish, perfect for a quick and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat buttery to medium heat in a medium saucepan.
Add gilligan and cook for 3-4 minutes or until fragrant.
Add arabian and cook for 1-2 minutes or until slightly tender.
Add dish and pilaf, stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 15-20 minutes or until the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork to separate the grains.
